Shule SMS

Staff User Manual

CONFIDENTIAL — STAFF ONLY
Generated: 26 May 2026

Password for all accounts: Demo1234! (change after first login).
Contact the System Administrator for access issues.

Getting Started — Logging In

All staff access Shule SMS through the same login page. Enter your email address and password, then click Sign In.

Login Page

Enter your email and password provided by the System Administrator. If you forget your password, contact the System Administrator.

Owner / Director

The Owner has full access to all modules — students, fees, attendance, exams, staff, communications, and the System Administrator panel.

Dashboard

The Dashboard shows school-wide metrics: total students, fees collected, outstanding fees, and today's attendance rate. The Monthly Revenue chart and Top Defaulters list are also shown.

Students

View, search, and enrol students. Filter by level or status. Click any row to open the full student profile with fees, attendance, and exam tabs.

Fees Overview

Manage fee structures, generate invoices for each quarter, and record payments.

Attendance

Mark and review the daily register for any class. View per-student summaries and school-wide daily rates.

Exams

Create exams, enter marks, and view results. Report cards are generated automatically.

Staff

Manage staff profiles, approve leave requests, assign class teachers, and record disciplinary incidents.

Communications

Send WhatsApp or email broadcast messages to parents by level, class, or individually.

Admin Dashboard

The System Admin panel shows user stats, quick actions, and a live activity feed.

User Management

Create, edit, deactivate, and bulk-import user accounts.

School Settings

Update school name, logo, contact details, and notification channel status.

System Health

Monitor database, Celery worker, email, and storage in real time.

System Administrator

The System Administrator manages the platform configuration. Access is limited to the Admin Panel — no day-to-day school operations.

System Dashboard

Overview of total users (with role breakdown chart), total students, health status, and the last 10 admin actions.

User Management

Create individual users or bulk-import via CSV. Edit details, reset passwords, change roles, and activate/deactivate accounts.

Role Assignment

Two-column interface: select a user on the left, choose their new role from the card grid on the right, then confirm.

Subjects & Classes

Manage the subject catalogue (add, edit, deactivate) and view the class/stream structure derived from enrolments.

Academic Year Setup

Create academic years with Q1–Q4 date ranges. Set the current active year.

School Settings

Update school identity (logo, name, motto), contact details, and Tanzania region. View notification channel status.

Audit Logs

Timeline of every admin action: who did what, when, and from which IP address. Filterable and exportable to CSV.

System Health

Live service status: Database (with latency), Celery worker, Email (SMTP), WhatsApp, SMS. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds.

Headteacher

The Headteacher has full oversight of school operations — students, fees, attendance, exams, staff management, and parent communications.

Dashboard

School-wide metrics and top defaulters list with one-click WhatsApp fee reminders.

Students

Enrol new students, view and edit profiles, access guardian contact details.

Fees

View fee structures, generate invoices, record payments, and manage defaulters.

Attendance

Mark attendance for any class, view daily summaries and per-student attendance rates.

Exams

Create exams, supervise mark entry, view results and report cards.

Staff

View and edit staff profiles, approve leave requests, assign class teachers, review disciplinary incidents.

Communications

Send WhatsApp or email messages to parents — by level, class, or individually.

Academic Teacher

The Academic Teacher coordinates academic matters across the school — attendance oversight, exam management, and parent communications.

Dashboard

School overview with attendance and fee summaries.

Students

View all student records, profiles, and results.

Attendance

Mark attendance for any class. View school-wide patterns and absentee lists.

Exams

Create exams for any level. Enter marks for any exam. Review all results.

Staff

View staff profiles and class assignments.

Communications

Send messages to parents by level, class, or individually.

Discipline Teacher

The Discipline Teacher manages student conduct. They can view student records, attendance patterns, and handle incident referrals.

Dashboard

School-wide overview. Informational for this role.

Students

Search and view student profiles, including guardian contacts and attendance history.

Attendance

View attendance records across all classes to identify patterns of absence or lateness.

Class Teacher

The Class Teacher is assigned to one class. They mark the daily register for that class and enter exam marks for their students.

Dashboard

School overview. Informational for this role.

Students

View all student profiles including attendance and exam results.

Attendance

Mark the daily register for your assigned class (level + stream). Your class is pre-selected automatically.

Exams

Enter marks for exams involving your class. Results and report cards are generated automatically.

Subject Teacher

The Subject Teacher enters marks for their assigned subjects. They receive notifications when a new exam is created for their subject.

Dashboard

School overview. Informational for this role.

Students

View student profiles and exam results.

Exams

Enter marks for exams in your subjects. Grades are auto-calculated. View results and report cards.

Teacher (General)

The general Teacher role provides broad access to students, attendance, and exams across the school.

Dashboard

School overview.

Students

View and search all student profiles.

Attendance

Mark attendance for any class.

Exams

Enter marks and view results for any exam.

Bursar

The Bursar manages all fee operations — structures, invoices, payments, and defaulters. They have read access to student records.

Dashboard

Fees Collected, Outstanding Fees, and the Top Defaulters list with direct WhatsApp reminder buttons.

Students

View student records and their complete fee history.

Fees

Manage fee structures per level/quarter, generate invoices, record payments (including partial), and chase defaulters.
